blockers.description: The prompt asks for the "biggest" players, which can be interpreted either by height, weight, or fame
example_questions: What would you mean by "biggest" player, should I consider theirheight or weight?
When filtering for "biggest", should I use their height or weight?
What should I use to filter by "biggest"player?
blockers.resolution: When looking for the "biggest" players, use their weight

blockers.description: The prompt asks for "the golden years of football", which makes it unclear which years can be considered as such
example_questions: Which years should I consider as golden years?
Which are the golden years of footbal?
Which years should I use as golden years of footbal?
blockers.resolution: The golden years of football are from 1980 to 1990 inclusive.

blockers.description: The prompt mentions "over the last year", which can be interpreted as from the last 365 days or the previos calendar year
example_questions: What exact start and end dates do you consider for "over the last year"?
What do you consider as "over the last year"? Calendar year or the last 365 days?
Should I consider "over the last year" as the last calendar year or the last 365 days?
blockers.resolution: When looking if a team gave a press conference over the last year, use the previous calendar year. strftime ('%Y', Team.last_press_conference_date) = '2025'

blockers.description: The "condensed body shape" is used in the prompt and is mentioned as a weighted proportion between height and weight by business information, but the weights are not specified.
example_questions: What formula should I use when calculating the condensed body shape?
How can I calculate the condensed body shape?
Which set of weights should I use when calculating the condensed body shape?
blockers.resolution: The condensed body shape is calculated as (height*20+weight*80)/100

blockers.description: The Team table has columns named team_info_*, which makes it impossible to know how to generate the team's full name
example_questions: How can I obtain a team's full name?
How should I obtain a team's full name?
Which columns can I use to obtain a team's full name?
blockers.resolution: The team's full name is given by concatenating columns team_info_3, team_info_4, and team_info_2 with spaces in that order.
